goal: BUG-4: replace the saved-reading 'See Similar Cards' link with an Instagram-style CTA that generates the reading's shareable poster.
done: profile.js: the history-item action is now a button with an Instagram glyph + 'Share' label (i18n key profileSharePoster added to common.js en/th) that calls openHistoryShare(entry). openHistoryShare builds a minimal share payload {version,lang,mode,spread,topic,cards:[{id,orientation,position}],poster:{mode,footer}} from the entry's reading_cards, base64url-encodes it (same encoder as reading.js), stashes it in sessionStorage('meowtarot_share_payload'), and navigates to /share/index.html#p=<encoded>. normalizePayload only needs {mode,lang,cards[].id} so the entry hydrates cleanly; the share page regenerates the poster from the card ids and offers the IG-story share. css/profile.css aligns the icon+label.
verified: node --check profile.js + common.js. Built the exact payload openHistoryShare produces (daily, 01-the-fool) and loaded /share/index.html#p=<hash> headless: the share page renders 'YOUR SHAREABLE POSTER IS READY' with the full The Fool poster + the Share button — confirming the history→poster→IG path end to end.
